Fader for controlling a JSyn Port using a decibel scale.

delete() - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.util.BussedVoiceAllocator
Calls clear() and also deletes the busReader.
delete() - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.util.VoiceAllocator
Calls clear().
deleteAll() - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthContext
Delete all tracked units, SynthSamples, SynthEnvelopes and other Synth objects created since initialize() was called.
deleteAll() - Static method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthObject
Delete all units, SynthSamples, SynthEnvelopes and other Synth objects created since Synth.startEngine() was called.
